free_text: Scanning scintillation detector for neutron flux
. Weighted mean of the cross sections measured at
13.4-14.9 MeV assuming the linear energy dependence.
Nb was used as main monitor, Al- as monitor for Nb.
See detailed explanations in Entry 41240 Subent .001
Data are taken from Table 1 of R,RI-252,1999
Preliminary data in Table 5.71 of R,INDC(CCP)-402,1997
M.M. Decay data were corrected in Subents
035,089. Free text was corrected to be human-readable.
POSSIBLE 1-ST VALUE OF SPIN OF THE FINAL
POSSIBLE 2-ND VALUE OF SPIN OF THE FINAL
-G was added in SF4 of REACTION.
.Parity of the ground state (-1) is indefinite
.Parities of the ground state (-1) and isomer state(+1)
